title: FrostPack
description: Oceany Pack. With a Blue Style and a stroke of white on the ui
body:
# What is FrostPack?
It is a Resource Pack That has an Oceany Theme and a white stroke and a custom Hotbar.
# What if The Modpack Has Issues and bugs
[Click Here](https://discord.gg/QmYjJwbheT) to join our discord were you can report bugs
# Who Owns FrostPack?
It Is Owned By AdorPacks Which is a Organization Whose Only Member/Owner/developer/Maker/project maker Is Ador.
# What if you want your modpack here?
You can't really submit mods here but you can by [Clicking Here](https://discord.gg/G9C9hnJ6Zf) You can join our discord server to help us making mods and modpacks.
# Credits:
> TheCoolAdor ( Made The Whole Pack ) |
# Links
[Support Discord Server](https://discord.gg/G9C9hnJ6Zf)    |
[Main Discord](https://discord.gg/G9C9hnJ6Zf)
